alkylation reagent: alkylation of β-mercaptoethanol with 0.1 M iodoacetamide
alkylation concentration: alkylation of β-mercaptoethanol with 0.1 M iodoacetamide
cleavage agent: digested with trypsin using an automated digestion robot
collision energy: acquired at a normalized collision energy of 35
enrichment method: purified it by affinity chromatography on glutathione-Sepharose beads
instrument: carried out on an LTQ XL Orbitrap mass spectrometer
ionization type: A Thermo nanospray II source was fitted
reduction reagent: induction of ER stress with 2 mM dithiothreitol (DTT)
reduction concentration: induction of ER stress with 2 mM dithiothreitol (DTT)
